bar_color.label: Bar colour
bar_color.description: Theme colour role used for the filled bar and knob.

slider_width.label: Slider width (px)
slider_width.description: On-screen width of the slider image. Height scales with it.

scroll_step.label: Scroll step (%)
scroll_step.description: How much one scroll notch changes the volume.

invert_scroll.label: Invert scroll direction
invert_scroll.description: By default scroll up raises the volume. Turn this on if it feels backwards.

show_percent.label: Show percentage
show_percent.description: Show the numeric volume (or "muted") as text beside the slider.
